summary: Live audit of the Frantic public board, 45 bounty records, nine detail pages, the public status API, and the public ledger.

observations.value: open=14 claimed=1 delivered=9 accepted=1 paid=20 total=45
all_ok=false; issue mirror reports 20 pending; board reports 14 open
All 45 board rows reconcile to the captured public read model and status open count.
Issue mirror has 20 pending items; process or retry the queue and expose oldest-pending age.
Six open runx-skill bounties (#27, #28, #29, #34, #36, #37) crowd one theme; stagger publication and add distinct outcome tags.
Open #34 overlaps paid #32; close #34 as superseded or rewrite it with an explicit distinction and link to #32.
#49 is $0 with 99 slots; label it clearly as goodwill/non-cash and state the accepted artifact.
#1 is still open with day-one language and a three-paid-bounty prerequisite; rewrite current eligibility tiers or close the founding window.
#33 publish docs and #45 audit gaps are adjacent but not duplicates; keep both, cross-link, and sequence publish before audit.
Nine exact public bounty detail pages were captured and analyzed, exceeding the five-page minimum.
Status, board, ledger, and bounty detail sources were publicly readable without authentication.
